title: Update authentication credentials to 'Sayem Ahtesham' and 'sayem_web_deployment'

requirements.summary: Update the frontend authentication hook to use the new hardcoded credentials: username 'Sayem Ahtesham' and password 'sayem_web_deployment'
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend authentication validates against username 'Sayem Ahtesham' and password 'sayem_web_deployment'
Login modal accepts and successfully authenticates with the new credentials
Old credentials no longer work in the login modal
Session storage stores the new credentials correctly after successful login

file_operations.description: Update the hardcoded authentication credentials from username 'sayemahtesham' and password '12345678' to username 'Sayem Ahtesham' and password 'sayem_web_deployment'. Maintain case-sensitivity for username validation and keep the existing session-based authentication flow intact.
